description_long: This is a rectangular sleeping bag with a warm, brown outer shell and a dark, almost black inner lining at the head section. The bag appears to be made from a synthetic, water-resistant fabric on the outside, with visible stitched seams running horizontally across its length. The head area is slightly raised and features a distinct color contrast, suggesting a built-in pillow or headrest. The sleeping bag is moderately thick, indicating the presence of insulating material inside, likely synthetic fiber or down. There are no visible zippers, straps, or external pockets, and the overall design is simple and utilitarian, suitable for outdoor or urban camping scenarios.
description: A brown rectangular sleeping bag with a dark head section and stitched seams, featuring a simple, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the brown sleeping bag with the dark head section on the left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the dark head section and the width of the sleeping bag.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the dark head section now on the right, showing the same stitched pattern.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the open, dark head section and the overall rectangular shape.
